name: Ascenda WF-05: Financial Model & LOI Generation

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Generate a structured financial model JSON for brand ' + $json.brandName + ' entering ' + $json.retailer + ' via Roadshow model. Category: ' + $json.category + '. Revenue tier: ' + $json.revenue + '. Include these exact JSON keys: projectedUnitsPerEvent (number), revenuePerEvent (number), retailPrice (number), cogsPct (number 0-100), grossMarginPct (number 0-100), ascendaCommissionPct (number), breakEvenEvents (number), year1Projection (number), year2Projection (number), roi (number 0-100), recommendedShowLength (string: 4/11/18 days), recommendedClubCount (number). Return ONLY valid JSON, no explanation.' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Draft a professional Letter of Intent for brand ' + $json.brandName + ' entering into a Roadshow/Consignment agreement with Ascenda Group for ' + $json.retailer + ' retail placement. Contact: ' + $json.contactName + '. Category: ' + $json.category + '. Include: Parties, Purpose, Economic Terms (based on roadshow model), Program Scope, Exclusivity, Timeline, Confidentiality, Next Steps. Professional legal language but clear terms. Reference Sam\'s Club Category 63 Pop-Up Shop program.' }] }) }}

parameters.subject: =LOI Ready for Review: {{ $json.brandName }} x Ascenda Group
parameters.message:
=

Letter of Intent Ready

LOI and financial model have been generated for {{ $json.brandName }}.

Financial Model Summary

  • Projected Revenue/Event: ${{ $json.financialModel.revenuePerEvent || 'TBD' }}
  • Gross Margin: {{ $json.financialModel.grossMarginPct || 'TBD' }}%
  • Break-Even Events: {{ $json.financialModel.breakEvenEvents || 'TBD' }}
  • Year 1 Projection: ${{ $json.financialModel.year1Projection || 'TBD' }}
  • ROI: {{ $json.financialModel.roi || 'TBD' }}%
  • Recommended Show Length: {{ $json.financialModel.recommendedShowLength || 'TBD' }}

LOI saved to brand folder in Google Drive. Review, adjust terms, and send to brand for signature.

Once LOI is signed, advance brand to Phase 6 (Roadshow Program Design).

meta.description: Stage 0 completion - Financial Model & LOI. Generates financial projections and Letter of Intent via Claude, saves to Drive, emails team for review.
